verdict.answer_first: A states the fix immediately: "The first thing to do is split your dependency install from your source copy"; B also answers early but adds a broad setup line first.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits to one first move and says "Do that first"; B gives the main fix, then expands into "two quick wins" and diagnostics.
verdict.fabrication: Both invent repo context: "No Dockerfile in this repo". B adds unsupported precision: "~90%".
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on because it gives the exact order, explains why, maps common stacks, and keeps later steps clearly secondary.
